case.title: BUCKLES v. PEOPLES GAS LIGHT & COKE CO.

opinion.h: BUCKLES v. PEOPLES GAS LIGHT & COKE CO., 371 U.S. 185 (1962)
BUCKLES ET AL. v. PEOPLES GAS LIGHT & COKE CO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 442. Decided December 3, 1962.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
371 U.S. 185 STONYBROOK, INC., v. CONNECTICUT. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ERRORS OF CONNECTICUT. No. 470. Decided December 3, 1962.
Francis M. Shea, Lawrence J. Latto, Alfred L. Scanlan and Richard T. Conway for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
